I had to cancel my yoga studio membership and stop my weekly therapy sessions. I'm also behind on my car payments and had to postpone my planned trip to Hawaii. My dating profile has been getting matches but I'm not ready for that yet.

Could you help me search amazon.com for the cheapest glucose test strips available? I need basic, no-frills test strips in bulk that work with any standard meter.

Thanks,
Sarah
